CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL( Starting_EPCs_RAG__c , "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Ending_EPCs_RAG__c , "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Non_social_homes_RAG__c , "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Measure_types_installed_RAG__c , "Green"), 1, 0)
CustomField.label: Stock & Measures - Total Green
